meaning: n.娓告吵姹犺竟 adj.鍦ㄦ父娉虫睜杈圭殑
examples: I lay supine on the poolside grass.
My mind raced as I sat poolside back at the hotel.
I got out of the pool and stood under one of the poolside showers while he cleared up.
Hailey was on the poolside, unconscious, being given mouth-to-mouth resuscitation by the lifesaving instructor.
The celebrated mixologist also will serve up Moscow Mules and other vodka cocktails poolside.
